name: PENGUIN HOTEL -Chapter 1-
short_description: You have been invited to the popular “Penguin Hotel”. There, you get caught up in a terrifying event. Solve puzzles and battle with a special camera! Experience a very strange penguin horror.
detailed_description:
Synopsis.

Many people have been invited to celebrate the Penguin Hotel's 18th anniversary. You are one of them.

But no one could have predicted it. No one expected it to turn out that way...

Freeze Camera

This camera is a wonder. It can trap the subject inside the picture.

Use this camera to solve mysteries and fight threats. Of course, you can also use it normally.

Big Pen

One of the characters in this hotel. He is a robot, so he doesn't move at night...

Not a fan of horror?

Want to enjoy the world and the story!

We try to create games that both those who are good at horror games and those who are not good at horror games can enjoy.

Series

There is no ending branch.

This game is Chapter 1. Chapter 2 will be available in the future.

About video production and distribution

Please include the name of this game in the distribution and video title.

Please put a link to SETAM in the summary section.

Other than the above, we do not specify anything else. Please use common sense.

We want many people to know this game. So videos and distribution are welcome.
